creator: billf@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Imported into ports/x11-toolkits/fltk with a few changes. 

(1) Added MASTER_SITES from ftpsearch.lycos.com 
(2) Removed the 125 ${INSTALL_DATA} lines and used one line: 
@ ${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/documentation/* ${PREFIX}/share/doc/fltk 

Other then that, looked good.
